summary: REQ-1 appears implemented via a new shared minutes+seconds formatter and Data Entry page wiring. Frontend quantity-scaling logic for Total Operator Hours is present, but the diff does not provide clear evidence that the saved/stored backend value matches the frontend display (REQ-2/REQ-3). Admin CRUD permission restoration (REQ-4) is not evidenced; backend still shows admin-only authorization for product creation in the visible portion of main.mo.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix Total Operator Hours so it scales with the entered “Quantity Produced”, and ensure the value shown on Data Entry and the value stored in production entries (and shown in Admin → Reports) use the same quantity-based calculation.
missing_requirements.reason: While frontend calculation code exists, the diff does not show the save-path wiring that ensures the backend-stored ProductionEntry.totalOperatorHours matches the frontend-displayed value at save time, nor any report-side confirmation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update backend Total Operator Hours computation to use duty-time threshold rule (10h target when duty<12h, 12h target when duty≥12h) × quantity produced + downtime, and not use form-entered cycle time when target cycle times are available.
missing_requirements.reason: The provided backend diff excerpt only shows authorization/profile/product management sections and does not include any visible changes to ProductionEntry storage or totalOperatorHours computation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Restore add/edit/delete of Products, Machines, and Operators from Admin for signed-in users by ensuring backend permissions allow intended authenticated users (not blocked by admin-only traps).
missing_requirements.reason: The backend code shown still enforces admin-only permission checks for product creation (and likely update/delete), and the diff summary does not show any corresponding permission relaxation or role/permission changes for CRUD methods across Products/Machines/Operators.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a new header login/logout UI component (LoginButton) and integrated it into the Header.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on cycle-time formatting, operator-hours scaling/alignment, and restoring Admin CRUD; it does not request adding a new global login button component/UI.

hallucinated_features.description: Added backend error normalization utility for friendlier authorization/validation messages.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not explicitly requested by any requirement; it is additional UX/error-handling functionality beyond the specified fixes.
